title: erigeron sublyratus
intro: Erigeron sublyratus, also known as Alpine Fleabane, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and a hairy stem. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Erigeron sublyratus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Erigeron sublyratus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
